# 知识架构总览

本页展示章节与知识架构层之间的映射关系。

## 自动生成：分层说明

| 架构层 | 章节 | 说明 |
| --- | --- | --- |
| motivation-and-economics | 前言、第1章、第2章 | Why inference optimization matters and how it changes business and adoption curves. |
| hardware-and-runtime | 第3章、第4章 | GPU fundamentals, runtime environment, and deployment prerequisites. |
| inference-mechanics | 第5章 | Core mechanics of token generation, attention, and runtime memory behavior. |
| optimization-techniques | 第6章、第7章、第8章、第9章 | Direct optimization levers for latency, throughput, memory, and quality. |
| production-systems | 第10章、附录B、附录C | Reliability, observability, operations, and production rollout patterns. |
| frontier-and-ecosystem | 第11章、附录A | Emerging architectures, ecosystem shifts, and forward-looking system design. |
